description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and runs a before_script executing `bundle install`. Define the variables JEKYLL_ENV=production, LANG=en_US.UTF-8, LANGUAGE=en_US.UTF-8, and LC_ALL=C.UTF-8. Add a `test` job in the test stage that runs `bundle exec jekyll build -d test`, stores the `test` directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except `master`. Add a `pages` job in the deploy stage that runs `bundle exec jekyll build -d public`, publishes the `public` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the `master` branch. No additional services, caches, or external deployment targets are required beyond GitLab Pages.
